song: 08 - There's A Boat Dat's Leavin' Soon For New York
comment: Published lyrics from Ira Gershwin. Bb major, Moderato (Tempo di Blues). Pickup 'There's a' lost by OMR (anacrusis not captured). First statement mm.1-8, second verse mm.10-12, reprise mm.13-17, bridge mm.19-36, coda mm.37-54. Many OCR-garbled syllables in early measures; late-song gaps (mm.37-45) filled where PDF is clear. Spurious A(major) chords wiped.

1.comment: Pickup 'There's a' lost by OMR. OCR capitalised 'DATS'; published is 'dat's'.

2.comment: OCR garbled 'leav-in'' as 'di'. Spurious A(major) chord wiped. Published: 'leav-in' soon'.

5.comment: Gap: 1 note with no lyrics. Published: 'wid' (from 'Come wid me').

6.comment: OCR grabbed 'You' from verse 2 and 'wid' from wrong position. Published: 'me,' continuing from 'Come wid me,'. Direction '?' is spurious.

8.comment: Gap: 3 notes with no lyrics. Published: 'sis-ter.' ending first phrase. Third note is melismatic (held).

10.comment: OCR truncated 'kin' to 'ki'. Published: 'me kin' (from 'You an' me kin').

11.comment: Pipeline skipped 'dat'. Published: 'live dat' (from 'live dat high life').

12.comment: Pipeline dropped 'high' and 'in'. Published: 'high life in New York.' 3 notes; middle syllables compressed.

14.comment: Pipeline reversed order. Published: 'wid me,' (from 'Come wid me,'). Direction '?' is spurious.

17.comment: OCR garbled second syllable. Published: 'sis-ter.' (end of 'sister').

23.comment: OCR merged 'lem' and 'we'll' into one token. Published: 'Har-lem we'll go strut-tin''. Corrected split.

26.comment: OCR misread 'We'll' as 'tin'' (from adjacent measure). Published: 'We'll' (start of 'We'll go a-strut-tin'').

27.comment: Normalize curly apostrophe to straight. Published: 'go a-strut-tin''.

37.comment: Gap: 1 note no lyrics. Published: 'smiles.' (end of 'Jes' noth-in' but smiles.').

38.comment: Gap: 1 note no lyrics. Published: 'Come' (start of 'Come a-long wid me,').

39.comment: Gap: 4 notes no lyrics. Published: 'a-long wid me,' (poco a poco cresc.).

40.comment: Gap: 4 notes no lyrics. Published: 'dat's de place,' with 1 melismatic note.

42.comment: Wrong punctuation (period should be comma) and missing 'a-' prefix. Published: 'a-long,' (from 'come a-long,').

43.comment: Gap: 1 note no lyrics. Published: 'come' (start of second 'come a-long.').

44.comment: Gap: 2 notes no lyrics. Published: 'a- long.' (end of final 'come a-long.').

45.comment: Gap: 3 notes no lyrics. Published: 'There's a- boat' (pickup to final verse, p.47).

46.comment: Pipeline dropped 'for' and 'New'. Spurious A(major) chord wiped. Published: 'for New York.'.

51.comment: Gap: 1 note no lyrics. Likely melismatic continuation before 'sis-ter' in m52.

52.comment: Missing comma. Published: 'sis-ter,' (not end of song, continues to final 'belong').

55.comment: Gap: 1 note no lyrics. Likely held continuation of final 'long.' -- no new syllable.
